name: opencode-router
description: Standalone opencode-router with management SPA and plugin

scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter ./packages/router typecheck && pnpm --filter ./packages/app typecheck && pnpm --filter ./packages/plugin typecheck
scripts.test: pnpm --filter ./packages/router test && pnpm --filter ./packages/app test && pnpm --filter ./packages/plugin test
scripts.dev:mock: MOCK_K8S=true DEV_EMAIL=dev@local.test ROUTER_DOMAIN=localhost:3002 ROUTER_PROTO=http PORT=3002 DEV_VITE_URL=http://localhost:5173 OPENCODE_IMAGE=ghcr.io/mrsimpson/opencode:latest pnpm --filter ./packages/router dev
